description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: Each Executive Vote has a dedicated Spell Team, made up of Spell Crafters and Spell Reviewers. The Spell Team must include one Crafter, who is responsible for crafting the spells. The Spell Team must also include at least two Reviewers, responsible for reviewing and confirming that the spells are ready for the Executive Vote, at least one of whom should be a member of a different Ecosystem Actor than the Spell Crafter. A Crafter cannot serve as a Reviewer for the same spell.

The Spell Team is a set of technical contributors working on developing all technical and smart-contract-related aspects of a particular Executive Vote, based on instructions set out by the Governance Point.
